metadata.description: Promote: 20-skill stack for end-to-end product promotion strategy. Takes a URL, asks the right questions about the product, produces a publish-ready strategy package.

plugins.name: promote
plugins.description: End-to-end promotion stack: 1 strategist orchestrator + 11 operator personas (Hormozi, Schwartz, Cialdini, Voss, Holiday, Ammar, Paul Graham, X-Mastery, MrBeast, Steve Jobs, customer-research) + 6 framework skills (JTBD-Switch, Dunford-Positioning, Four-Fits, PLG-Design, GEO-Optimization, AI-Content-Pipeline) + 1 utility (huashu-nuwa) + 11 reference docs (Rumelt strategy kernel, Cialdini psychology, JTBD, GEO levers, growth loops, North Star, demand-gen, attribution, network effects, copy frameworks, skill-grammar).
